card_number: Credit card number (can be masked for test data)
primarycardserno: Serial number of the primary card issued
overduedate: Date since which payment is overdue
minamount: Minimum amount due for the billing cycle
lastpaymentpartitionkey: Used in system for internal partitioning
instalmentcount: Number of active EMI plans on this account
excesspaymentamount: Excess paid above dues (used in pre-payments or refunds)
latepaymentfee: Penalty charged due to late payment
next_payment_due_date: Date by which the next credit card payment is due. Often shown on dashboard.
autopay_enabled: Whether auto-debit is enabled for paying minimum/full amount on due date.
linked_mobile_number: Last 4 digits of the registered mobile number used for SMS/OTP communication.
card_network: The payment network/brand of the credit card. Often shown on card image.
is_primary_card: Indicates if this is the main card held by the customer (vs add-on cards).
card_expiry: Expiry date printed on the card, used to simulate expired card warnings.
card_block_reason: Reason for card being blocked or suspended. Helps simulate negative journeys.
max_credit_limit: Max limit allowed for the customer
